zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield於1344年出生在英國薩默塞特易爾頓時，他的父親Gilbert De Wadham24歲，母親Elizabeth De Shilston22歲。他於1366年與Joan de Wrottesley在英國戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1401年被列為member of parliament for devon。他去世於1412年7月27日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield于1344年出生在英国薩默塞特易爾頓时，他的父亲Gilbert De Wadham24岁，母亲Elizabeth De Shilston22岁。他于1366年与Joan de Wrottesley在英国戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1401年被列为member of parliament for devon。他去世于1412年7月27日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield was born in 1344, in Ilton, Somerset, England, his father, Gilbert De Wadham, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth De Shilston, was 22. He married Joan de Wrottesley in 1366, in St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. In 1401, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for devon. He died on 27 July 1412, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield est né en 1344, à Ilton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert De Wadham, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Shilston, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Wrottesley en 1366, à St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. En 1401, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for devon. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1412, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield 1344 in Ilton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert De Wadham 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Shilston 22. Er hat 1366 in St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England Joan de Wrottesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1401, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for devon aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Juli 1412 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield è nato il nel 1344 nel Ilton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Gilbert De Wadham, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth De Shilston, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Wrottesley nel 1366, nel St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1401, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for devon. Morì il 27 luglio 1412, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifieldが1344年にイギリスソメルセトイルトンで生まれた時，父Gilbert De Wadhamは24歳，母Elizabeth De Shilstonは22歳であった。1366年にイギリスデボンノウストーンスト ペテル'ス チャーチでJoan de Wrottesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1401年，57歳の時，職業はmember of parliament for devonと記録されている。彼は1412年7月27日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスデボンブランスコンベスト ウィニフレド'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: 영국 데폰 브랜스코브 스트 윈이프레드'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield(이)가 1344년 영국 서머세트 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert De Wadham(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Shilston(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1366년 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치에서 Joan de Wrottesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1401년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament for devon이었다. 그는 1412년 7월 27일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 브랜스코브 스트 윈이프레드'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield nasceu em 1344, em Ilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert De Wadham, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Shilston, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Wrottesley em 1366, em St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1401, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for devon. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1412, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия
ru.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: ст винифред'с чурч, бранскомб, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield родился в 1344 г. в местности илтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert De Wadham было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Shilston, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Wrottesley в 1366 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1401 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for devon. Он умер 27 июля 1412 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ст винифред'с чурч, бранскомб, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield nació en 1344, en Ilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert De Wadham, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Shilston, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan de Wrottesley en 1366, en St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1401, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for devon. Murió el 27 de julio de 1412, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra.
